fields.name: Single-Parent Family Status Declaration
fields.value: Option 1|||I am a parent in a single-parent family (Section 11) living separately. This section should be filled out only by a parent who lives separately and is requesting tax credit points for their children, who are in their custody and for whom they receive child allowance from the National Insurance Institute (as per Section 7 below), and who does not maintain a shared household with another individual.
